programs.title: Comeback 3
programs.desc: Valerie Cherish, a once popular television actress, rose to fame as a sitcom star.After many years, he wants to return to the small screen at all costs.He decides to take part in a new reality show.

programs.title: A Big Bold Beautiful Journey
programs.desc: Sarah (Margot Robbie) and David (Colin Farrell) meet at a friend's wedding.They go on an expedition during which they relive the most important moments from their past.

actor: Father of the Bride - Mike Meldman

programs.title: Industry 2
programs.sub_title: Short to the Point of Pain

programs.title: The Knick
programs.desc: New York, the first years of the 20th century.Brilliant surgeon Dr. John Thackery (Clive Owen) leads a brave team of young medics at Knickerbocker Hospital.The doctor introduces pioneering medical solutions while struggling with cocaine addiction.His team is making breakthroughs in medicine at a time when antibiotics do not yet exist and patient mortality is terrifyingly high.The group of distinguished medical staff includes, among others:protégé Everett Gallinger (Eric Johnson) and Algernon Edwards (Andre Holland), a promising surgeon from Europe who was included in the team against Thackery's wishes.The series is directed by Oscar winner Steven Soderbergh.

actor: Dr. John W. Thackery - Clive Owen

programs.title: Georgie \u0026 Mandy'S First Marriage 2
programs.desc: Young married couple Georgie and Mandy are raising their daughter, learning everyday life in their new role as parents.Each day brings new challenges and fatigue that puts their relationship to the test.
